name: ELASTOFIBROMA DORSI
definition: degenerative / reactive fibrous pseudotumor forming as a reaction to chronic mechanical

demographics.Frequency: in 24% of women + 11% of men > 55 years (autopsy study); in 2% of CT
demographics.Histo: enlarged irregular serrated elastic hypereosinophilic fibers, collagen, scattered

dominant_finding: heterogeneous poorly defined lesion of soft-tissue attenuation similar to muscle
discriminating_features: heterogeneous poorly defined lesion of soft-tissue attenuation similar to muscle
well-defined heterogeneous intermediate-SI lesion similar to muscle on T1WI + T2WI
interspersed streaks of fat intensity in fascicular pattern

CT: heterogeneous poorly defined lesion of soft-tissue attenuation similar to muscle
MR: well-defined heterogeneous intermediate-SI lesion similar to muscle on T1WI + T2WI
interspersed streaks of fat intensity in fascicular pattern
